mapper.sql: session_id, uid, title, preview, message_count, status, summary_status, summary_generated_at, summary_retry_count, summary_error, summary_attempted_at, pinned, pinned_at, created_at, updated_at, archived_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM chat_session WHERE uid = #{uid} AND status = 'active'
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR preview LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY pinned DESC, pinned_at DESC, updated_at DESC
